items.title: Faster tokenizer for LLM pipelines
items.oneliner: Open-source tokenizer claims up to 1000x faster throughput than HuggingFace, with Tiktoken and Transformers compatibility.

items.title: Rust framework for reactive web apps
items.oneliner: Tokio's new full-stack Rust framework builds server-rendered reactive apps without the usual SPA complexity.

items.title: Browser Unix sandbox with Wasm
items.oneliner: Wasm-native Unix environment runs sandboxed programs in-browser, with VS Code integration and no server required.

items.title: Algebraic effects library for C99
items.oneliner: Portable C99 library brings algebraic effect handlers and safe stack capture to async systems code.

items.title: Learn rendering by building one
items.oneliner: Hands-on tutorial builds a software renderer in 500 lines of C++ and explains core 3D graphics primitives.

items.title: SVG benchmark for image models
items.oneliner: Reproducible eval generates 1,008 SVGs across seven models to compare structured image generation behavior.

items.title: On-device model with confidence routing
items.oneliner: GitHub repo shows how to add confidence scoring so local models can defer uncertain answers automatically.

items.title: Emacs workflow for GitHub issues
items.oneliner: Practical Emacs automation uses gh to pull GitHub issues into Org Agenda without a full GitHub client.

items.title: Scala and Kotlin on Emacs
items.oneliner: Step-by-step setup replaces IntelliJ with Emacs Eglot and LSPs for Scala and Kotlin development.

items.title: Test-time training for 3D reconstruction
items.oneliner: Open repo includes code, checkpoints, and inference scripts for improving 3D reconstruction with test-time training.
